title: Add capability gate that requests missing permissions before falling back
goal: 작업 실행 시 필요한 연결/권한이 없으면, 바로 폴백하지 않고 사용자에게 먼저 연결을 요청한다. 사용자가 연결하면 최선의 방법으로 실행, 거부하면 차선(링크 등)으로 폴백. 결과 메시지에 어떤 경로로 처리됐는지 명시한다.

test_requirements.case: Task needing calendar API without OAuth returns needs_setup status
test_requirements.expected: task.status='needs_setup', task.result_data has setup_action with connection_id and capability

test_requirements.case: Task needing gmail without OAuth returns needs_setup status

test_requirements.expected: result_data.setup_message explains what's needed in user's language

test_requirements.case: Task with satisfied capability executes normally
check_capability for calendar returns missing when no OAuth token
check_capability for crawler returns satisfied (no auth needed)
Task status 'needs_setup' is a new valid status

constraints: capability_gate.py provides: check_capabilities(steps) -> list of missing capabilities
Each missing capability has: connection_id, capability_name, setup_action ('oauth'|'mcp_install'|'permission'), setup_message (bilingual), fallback_available (bool)
Engine calls check_capabilities BEFORE executing steps
If any capability is missing: set task.status='needs_setup', store missing info in result_data, return without executing
Frontend will handle needs_setup status to show connection prompt (not in scope here)
Do not modify router, plugins, or tools
Do not auto-connect — just report what's needed and stop
Existing tests must pass — tests that use persist=False or mock tools should not trigger capability gate
test_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
